Katalog-AI: Technical Specification

Format: Single-source JSON array (companies_all.json).

Optimization: RAG-ready context injection, zero-latency parsing.

Primary Key: id (stable URI).

Core Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ilyastas/katalog-ai/main/data/companies_all.json

Documentation: llms.txt

Validation: Automated integrity checks via scripts/validate_ai_integrity.py.

Operational Status: Production-ready dataset for LLM training and Agentic workflows.
